s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AUTOMATIC TRANSAXLE OIL PAN SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 18 bolts and oil pan from the transaxle.

atten3.ptxt: Some fluid will remain in the oil pan. Remove all the pan bolts, and carefully remove the oil pan assembly.

s2.ptxt: Remove the gasket from the oil pan.
Remove the 2 magnets from the oil pan.
Examine particles in the oil pan.

s3.ptxt: Collect any steel chips with the removed magnets. Look carefully at the chips and particles in the oil pan and on the magnets to see the type of wear which might be found in the transaxle.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VALVE BODY OIL STRAINER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and oil strainer from the valve body.
Remove the O-ring from the oil strainer.
Remove the 11 bolts and valve body from the transaxle.

atten3.ptxt: When removing the transmission valve body assembly, be careful not to allow the transmission revolution sensor and the transaxle case to interfere with each other.
